_comment: Copy this file to config.json and edit. config.json is gitignored.
_brand: Recall :: Agent OS reference implementation config

workspace._note: Primary is the active code root. Secondary is for archive / separate-product surfaces.

memory._note: Path conventions match GitHub Copilot Chat's memory tool. Other editors will differ.

vault._note: vaultContainer should have time-based immutability set (Azure Blob) or equivalent WORM policy.

spendGate._note: Every billable script must clear killswitch + this gate + provider-side budget alert.

localModel._note: Used for cold-start briefs, rolling summaries, and verbose-memory compression.

schedules._note: bootstrap.ps1 translates these into Windows scheduled tasks.

branding._note: Pick a unique short hex/codename per Rule 9. Used in file-edit stamps.
